name: fsm_core
description: This package is used for the main PostgreSQL files for the FSM project.

scripts.supabase:docker:volume:clean: VOLUME=$(docker volume ls -q --filter label=com.supabase.cli.project=database-src); if [ -n "$VOLUME" ]; then docker volume rm $VOLUME; else echo 'No matching docker volume to remove.'; fi
scripts.supabase:gen:types: supabase gen types typescript --local --schema public,fsm_core,pgmq > database.types.ts
scripts.supabase:restart:with:diff: npm run supabase:stop && npm run supabase:docker:volume:clean && npm run supabase:db:diff:schemafolder:sql && npm run supabase:start:env && npm run supabase:gen:types
scripts.supabase:restart:with:diff:manualrelease: npm run supabase:stop && npm run supabase:docker:volume:clean && npm run supabase:db:diff:schemafolder:sql:manualrelease && npm run supabase:start:env && npm run supabase:gen:types

author: Niraj Kashyap
